name: laslogTMX — Signup Fraud Velocity Check
description: Secondary fraud layer: alert on velocity breaches and high-risk signups. Import modules into Make.com manually.

trigger.name: signup_fraud_webhook
trigger.notes: Point Supabase Database Webhook (INSERT on fraud_flags) here, or call from app after signup.

modules.description: Receives { email, ip, fingerprint, reason, created_at } from fraud_flags insert

modules.filter: reason = signup_attempt AND created_at >= {{addHours(now; -24)}} AND (email = {{1.email}} OR ip = {{1.ip}})
modules.description: Count signup attempts in last 24h for same email OR IP

actions.message: laslogTMX signup velocity alert: {{1.email}} / {{1.ip}} — {{length(2)}} attempts in 24h

rules.primary_enforcement: Supabase RPC assess_signup_risk (blocks before account creation)

env.MAKE_COM_FRAUD_WEBHOOK: Paste webhook URL from Module 1 into .env
